overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight beam. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, showing continuous forward movement along a dirt path surrounded by dense trees and tall grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the narrow dirt path, sweeping the flashlight beam across the trail ahead to navigate through the darkness

entered.detail: narrow winding trail composed of packed dirt and small stones, illuminated by the warm flashlight beam
tall trees with dense foliage forming a dark wall along the left side of the path
tall trees with thick trunks and branches creating a dense boundary on the right side
tall grass and underbrush lining both sides of the path, catching the edge of the flashlight beam
small visible patch of dark night sky visible through the tree canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. The path is illuminated by a warm flashlight beam that reveals the rough ground texture and tall grass lining the route. Dark trees form walls on both sides, with only a small patch of night sky visible through the canopy above. No other agents or structures are present in this isolated woodland setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dense, isolated forest at night, maintaining a sense of claustrophobic solitude. It begins by gliding steadily along a narrow dirt trail, where a warm flashlight beam cuts through the darkness to reveal the rough texture of the ground. As the camera advances, the light catches the tall grass lining the route, emphasizing the narrowness of the path. The scene remains enclosed by walls of dark trees that loom on both sides, leaving only a small, distant patch of night sky visible through the thick canopy above.
